Carson Block  
 predicts that this will result in a huge stock-market slump. “We will witness not just an almighty market correction, but the end of the existing social contract,” he writes.

75184.subject: Plaid’s AI now sees what no single bank can 👀🏦; Santander just open-sourced its AI governance stack. No other ma…
75184.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse405

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
GLM-5.2: The ChatGPT Moment for Local AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/786470b6-16a2-49cc-8bcf-b4545207ced4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/786470b6-16a2-49cc-8bcf-b4545207ced4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Why the first open-weight model that rivals Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 — and runs on a single Mac — changes the game for every founder, builder, and investor]
Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With Stanford’s STORM Method [ https://substack.com/redirect/e90e7962-551d-4b6a-b121-c299ca56580c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🧠 [ https://substack.com/redirect/e90e7962-551d-4b6a-b121-c299ca56580c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Stanford’s proven AI research framework, adapted for Claude — with copy-paste prompts and a ready-made Skill]
Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Claude Opus 4.8 [ https://substack.com/redirect/db6f1ee4-c095-4d04-9a85-7519a3dc4df6?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🔓 [ https://substack.com/redirect/db6f1ee4-c095-4d04-9a85-7519a3dc4df6?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The full Fable 5 system prompt and the step-by-step guide to turn Claude Opus 4.8 into a Fable-class AI assistant after Anthropic shut it down]
Loop Engineering: How to Design AI Loops That Build, Ship, and Improve While You Sleep [ https://substack.com/redirect/c0da1050-5c5a-49b8-9dad-cec8d84c00b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🔁 [ https://substack.com/redirect/c0da1050-5c5a-49b8-9dad-cec8d84c00b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [From a three-line bash script to multi-day Claude Fable 5 autonomy — everything founders, builders, and investors need to stop prompting agents and start designing the systems that prompt them]
How to Pre-Mortem Any Decision With AI: The Future Failure Audit Skill for Claude [ https://substack.com/redirect/c3a0ab71-796f-4d28-b185-24d2bedf639b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🔮 [ https://substack.com/redirect/c3a0ab71-796f-4d28-b185-24d2bedf639b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The highest-leverage Claude skill most founders are missing. It assumes your plan has already failed, finds the hidden assumption that kills it, and rewrites it before you

75183.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 28
75183.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-28-oleh-bezuhlyi-hwdyf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BwFxCSnUnTo6lXAgFSVTwFw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=34J_3tz9oVmYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqy3hd4t~hg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqy3hd4t-hg
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Markets are bleeding into quarter-end: Bitcoin slipped under $60K, ETFs shed $1.79B, and capital is rotating toward AI. Yet regulators stayed busy — Europe sharpened MiCA penalties while Washington locked out a CBDC for four years. 📉 Bitcoin Slides Below $60K Into a Rare Back-to-Back Quarterly Loss Bitcoin dropped under the $60,000 mark heading into quarter-end, down roughly 7% on the week with altcoins falling even harder. Both BTC and ETH are closing the second quarter in the red — a back-to-back losing first half that breaks the usual seasonal pattern. Read full story 🏦 Spot Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $1.79B in Second-Largest Weekly Redemption US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $1.79 billion in net outflows last week, the second-largest weekly redemption on record. The sustained exodus points to cooling institutional appetite and piles pressure onto an already-fragile market. More details ⚖️ EU's EBA Unveils Steep MiCA Fines Targeting Token Issuers The European Banking Authority laid out a penalty framework that can strip non-compliant significant token issuers of up to 12.5% of their annual revenue. It's one of the first hard-edged enforcement signals as Europe's landmark MiCA rules move from theory to practice. Read more 🏛️ Congress Bars a US CBDC for Four Years A four-year ban on a Federal Reserve-issued digital dollar was folded into the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which cleared the Senate 85-5 and the House 358-32. Private stablecoin issuers like Circle and Tether stand to benefit most, though the broader fight over digital money is far from settled. See details 🏠 FHFA Tells Fannie and Freddie to Draft Crypto Mortgage Plans The US Federal Housing Finance Agency has directed Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to prepare proposals for factoring crypto holdings into mortgage lending. If adopted, the move could reshape how digital assets count toward homeownership eligibility. Read full story 💰 Saylor Teases More Bitcoin Buying With Strategy ~$13B Underwater Michael Saylor signaled another Bitcoin purchase even as Strategy's stock keeps sliding and its position sits roughly $13 billion underwater. A Monday filing would mark the firm's fourth straight week of accumulation, despite mounting market skepticism. More details 🛠️ Base Pins Back-to-Back Outages on a Sequencer Bug Coinbase's Base layer-2 published a pos

75177.subject: Well Informed: Is too much sleep as bad as too little?
75177.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjF9AAcAAAAAA0xeBYkkXQ8l3JHf_cfAiNE6siqeTdSVDrfPsnQ-FVcKv4XCj-h_l-bKWIB-P6OF1u1RNdMLs2xn9tWjnEIoTKE1ThQNj-BmmM17_OGCKe4 

June 28th 2026

 

 
 
 
Well Informed

 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness


 
 
 






 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjF9AAcAAAAAA0xeBYkl6emxaN6L0HXHQ0TVItPn89K2y2TWLcvyIhh7KQQTCyn-xDaXwhd7NZ1epFa-uUcVuEQrZXI7RXc0KCzyQny96sIKdRQ8n2pytA0 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjF9AAcAAAAAA0xeBYkmSO43E2ICaoiiUwC2x9vYYsYWJrTB0d_alKI8XROo9hbzzEj7JUXZoleZq9RxrNewiazOqG2zZqwEQVbV2xXV9vLY6XZFwoDi_EA 



 Is too much sleep as bad as too little?


 Tim Cross
